global.description: The ad features a combination of text and graphic elements centered around a financial tracking theme.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to track their finances with VaultRun.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element that appears to be a rounded rectangle shape with a light background.

elements.label: Overlay graphic element
elements.description: An overlay graphic element that is slightly smaller and positioned above the central graphic, featuring a light color.

elements.label: Additional overlay element
elements.description: Another overlay graphic element that is similar in size and shape to the previous one, positioned slightly lower.

elements.label: Lower graphic element
elements.description: A lower graphic element that is a rectangular shape, positioned centrally with a light background.

elements.label: Left graphic element
elements.description: A smaller graphic element located on the left side, featuring a rounded rectangle shape.

elements.label: Main body text
elements.description: A prominent text element at the bottom of the ad, featuring a bold font that communicates a message about tracking finances.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Ad headline
elements.description: A large, bold text element at the top of the ad that reads 'VaultRun' in a striking font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A small text element at the bottom right corner that encourages users to take action with the phrase 'Start now'.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, clean and modern, financial tracking theme
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is positioned at the top, the main body text is centered, and the CTA is located at the bottom right.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: VaultRun, Track every euro, Built for peace of mind, Start now
